title: hemizonia congesta subsp. vernalis
intro: Hemizonia congesta subsp. vernalis, also known as Spring Gum Plant or Vernal Tarweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its tarweed oil content. The health benefits of Hemizonia congesta subsp. vernalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its herbal applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
